headline: Madison Air Up 16% After Biggest US Industrial IPO Since ‘99
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Madison Air Solutions Corp. shares rose 16% after the company raised $2.23 billion in the biggest US listing of an industrial firm in close to three decades.Shares of the provider of ventilation and filtration systems traded at $31.26 as of 1:07 p.m. Thursday afternoon in New York, compared to the initial public offering price of $27 each. The company sold 82.7 million shares after marketing them for $25 to $27 apiece. The trading gives the Chicago-based company a market value of
